market_pulse.one_liner: Tech-led rally broadens as VIX dips; oversold mega-cap signals and heavy call flow in NVDA/SPY point to sustained risk appetite.
market_pulse.sector_rotation: Rotation into tech/growth as Nasdaq leaps 2%; defensives lag with Dow up only 0.6%. AI and crypto bets boosted by Wood.

opportunities.thesis: RSI 34.7 oversold below moving average, massive call buying at 200/207.5 strikes (Vol/OI 39k & 162k) suggests institutional accumulation dip.
opportunities.catalyst: AI momentum from Wood's increased bet; technical bounce off oversold levels.

opportunities.thesis: RSI 27.2 deep oversold with value PE signal; below MA and screener score 7 indicating strong mean-reversion potential.
opportunities.catalyst: Short-covering rally in beaten-down SaaS; market rotation toward value tech.

opportunities.thesis: RSI 11.3 extreme oversold, historically such readings lead to snapback rallies; below MA adds confluence.
opportunities.catalyst: Any positive AI/cloud news; extreme fear exhaustion.

risk_alerts.alert: Ukraine-Russia escalation (strikes on cargo ships, Putin rejects talks) could spike energy prices and reverse risk-on sentiment.
TSLA heavy put flow (Vol/OI 31k at $380) signals bearish bets despite market rally; avoid long exposure.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Heightens geopolitical uncertainty; could pressure risk assets if conflict escalates, though no direct portfolio impact.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Raises supply chain and energy disruption fears, potentially affecting broad market sentiment.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Astronauts return to ISS after sheltering during air leak repair attempt
Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Domestic political issue, minimal global market influence.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
Iran footballers issued US visas for World Cup, says White House
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Positive diplomatic gesture but no direct portfolio implications.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Zelenskyy: Putin choosing war by rejecting offer for in-person talks
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Reinforces the stalemate; may dampen risk sentiment if narrative hardens.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Trump hails jobs surge, says Iran talks ‘going well’
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Positive rhetoric supports risk-on, but mostly noise; limited effect on portfolio.

immediate: Initiate long NVDA on any pullback to $195-200 with tight stop at $190
